hero.label: Apartments
hero.text: Choose the staircase and explore the residential units.
hero.description: The apartments are organized into 4 residential staircases. Each staircase has its own units, clearly presented for a simple and elegant experience.

parking.label: Optional parking
parking.title: Choose the parking space for your apartment
parking.text: The residence offers 31 parking units. View the floor plans, types, and parking availability.
